label: Curved scaler
description: Animates scale along one or more world axes over the fleck lifetime using a SimpleCurve.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve that maps normalized fleck lifetime (0–1) to a scale multiplier.

axisMask.label: Axis mask
axisMask.description: World-space axes this scaler affects as (x, y, z). Use 1 to enable an axis and 0 to ignore it. Source default is Vector3.one.

scaleAmt.label: Scale amount
scaleAmt.description: Target scale multiplier as a FloatRange. The curve output is multiplied by this value.

scaleTime.label: Scale time
scaleTime.description: Duration over which the curve plays as a FloatRange in seconds.
